project_type: Next.js 15 App Router with TypeScript - Premium web design studio website
test_framework: Next.js build validation (production build as primary verification)
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/cocc && npm run build && npm run lint
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to verify production build succeeds. 2. Run npm run lint to check for lint errors.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/cocc 2. npm install 3. npm run build
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access to npm registry, CDNs, etc. Node.js v22 available via nvm.
contribution_requirements: Greenfield project - no existing contribution guidelines.
key_patterns: Next.js 15 App Router conventions: app/ directory for routes, components/ for reusable UI, lib/ for utilities. GSAP for animations. CSS Modules or Tailwind for styling.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and layouts | components/ - Reusable UI components (Navigation, Footer, Cursor, Modal, etc.) | lib/ - Utility functions, animation helpers, constants | styles/ - Global styles and CSS modules | public/ - Static assets (images, videos, fonts)
